description:
Configure a new critical alert profile in ADAudit Plus (http://localhost:8081) to detect administrative activity outside of business hours. Create an alert profile named 'Off-Hours_Admin_Activity' with the description 'Alerts for user modifications outside business hours'. The profile must trigger on 'User Management' events (specifically user modifications) with 'Critical' severity during 'Non-Business Hours'. Ensure the alert is enabled and visible in the system.

Credentials:
- Username: admin
